steps.title: Trace the reference
steps.content: The phrase “This relative scarcity” points back to the previous sentence: plant-based artifacts are seldom studied because they are perishable. That scarcity makes well-preserved organic artifacts especially notable.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong references
steps.content: Choice A invents an unfulfilled research goal. Choice B makes the phrase about uncertainty, not scarcity. Choice C says it distinguishes artifact types, but the phrase refers to the rarity of plant-based artifacts.

steps.title: Identify the difficulty
steps.content: The referenced scarcity is a challenging situation for researchers, since perishable plant-based artifacts are rarely available for study. The answer is D.
